title: InterPoll Post (v1)
description: Replicated Post object as written/read by postService.ts. Normative companion to IPP-03.

authorId.description: Currently the deviceId; see IPP-01 identity migration.

upvotes.description: Per-user vote-keyed idempotent counter; recomputed client-side.

authorPubkey.description: Schnorr x-only pubkey (hex) of the signer.

contentSignature.description: Schnorr signature over IPP-02 canonicalJSON of {authorId, communityId, content, createdAt, title}.

canonVersion.description: Canonicalization algorithm version for contentSignature. 2 = IPP-02 canonicalJSON. Absent = legacy v1 (canonicalPostPayloadV1). See IPP-02 §6.

dataVersion.description: Client-side only: which Gun namespace this post came from (e.g. 'v3').
